content.text:

2. **Follow Up with Marcus:** Reach out to him regarding his overdue invoice.
3. **Update Account Status:** Mark Sofia's account as paid in full. 

*(Additional implied goals/tasks mentioned: Marketing needs to launch the new landing page by the end of the month, and Engineering needs to address the blocking API rate limit issue).*
